name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: FWD: It all comes down to Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Wanted to bump this, everyone.
Winning the Senate run-off elections in Georiga is our last chance to give President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President-elect Kamala Harris a Democratic majority.
[**Please don 't wait. Rush $3 or as much as you can to help Reverend Raphael Warnock flip one of Georgia's Senate seats.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc669/2a380d31/201f2626/f0419c/1606699402/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzLWtpY2tfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs-kick_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Raphael's far-right opponent, Kelly Loeffler, is already spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to defeat him. Since Raphael isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, he's counting on grassroots supporters like you to kick in $3 or whatever makes sense for you in order to power his campaign.
[**Please give whatever you can right now to win in Georgia, defeat the GOP, and flip the Senate.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc669/2a380d31/201f2626/f0419c/1606699402/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzLWtpY2tfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs-kick_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you!
_\----------Original Message----------
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
From: Raphael Warnock
Subject: It all comes down to Georgia_
Hi there,
I'm in the fight of my life against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) to flip Georgia's Senate seat blue. And according to _The Washington Post_ , what happens here could determine whether Democrats are able to secure Senate control and enact our bold agenda. I urgently need your help to win this race -- but before I ask you to chip in, I need to give you an update on why your support is so important.
**Right now, our momentum is unbelievable.** After starting this campaign trailing our GOP opponent, our people-powered movement surged into first place -- something pundits said was impossible just a few months ago. Now, we've forced a head-to-head runoff election with Kelly Loeffler on Jan. 5 -- and experts from Nate Silver to NBC News say we can really win this thing. In other words: **We're within striking distance of defeating the Republicans and making history.**
Here's the bad news: With all eyes on Georgia, Loeffler is spending over $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to defeat me, and the GOP is funneling in millions more to buy this seat for Mitch McConnell and block the Democratic agenda. Experts say this could be the most expensive race in history.
I don't take a dime from corporate PACs -- I never have and I never will. But with Republicans spending MILLIONS to defeat me and keep this seat red, I need an immediate surge of grassroots support to win. [**So please, will you give $3 or more right now to defeat the GOP and flip this Georgia seat blue?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc669/2a380d31/201f2626/f0419c/1606699402/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzLWtpY2tfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs-kick_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
There's far more than a Senate seat on the line in this race. My opponent is a far-right Trump loyalist who has run a campaign of divisiveness and bigotry. Meanwhile, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service -- and in January, I could become Georgia's first-ever Black senator. With health care and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, we simply can't afford to send another Trump Republican to Washington.
My campaign set a goal to raise another $25,000 by midnight to defeat Kelly Loeffler -- and in a race this close, falling short just isn't an option. But unfortunately, our campaign is not on track to raise what we need to win -- which could mean we have to take our ads off the air and cut back our voter protection efforts.
We can only win Georgia and secure Senate control for Democrats with immediate support from folks like you, everyone. So please, I'm personally asking because the stakes are so incredibly high: [**Will you give $3 or more today to help us win in Georgia, defeat the GOP and secure a Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc669/2a380d31/201f2626/f0419c/1606699402/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzLWtpY2tfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs-kick_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thanks for pitching in at this historic moment.
Raphael Warnock

> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc669/2a380d31/201f2626/f0419c/1606699402/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzLWtpY2tfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs-kick_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc669/2a380d31/201f2626/f0419d/1606699402/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Ralph Northam
subject: The blue wave rolls on in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
|
---

---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/s-iRQbhrZEUK-ueevppzeln1jHX5iYFMKuGxgzhd2No=/Ll_OgYM99efww0TMcRrCXIO7HIP2Hf6EQzxqtdyUKU4=)
---
Friend Thank you for everything you have done to keep the blue wave going in Virginia. We had some historic wins last week. First, I want to congratulate President-elect Joe Biden and Vice-President-elect Kamala Harris. Now is the time to bring our country back together after years of division. I am looking forward to working with the Biden-Harris administration over the next year. We made real progress in Virginia. We won Virginia Beach for the first time in a presidential election since 1964. And we won Chesterfield County and Lynchburg for the first time since 1948. Virginia is getting a darker shade of blue every year. Senator Mark Warner won a resounding victory, and, we re-elected Rep. Abigail Spanberger, Rep. Elaine Luria and Rep. Jennifer Wexton, ensuring we keep a majority of Virginia's congressional delegation. Also, Roanoke Mayor Sherman Lea, Sr. and Richmond Mayor Levar Stoney won big victories in their cities. It was a great night to be a Virginia Democrat. Thank you for everything you did to make this victory possible. Ralph

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/s-iRQbhrZEUK-ueevppzeln1jHX5iYFMKuGxgzhd2No=/swZTphD91G5Ve95s2hLRqCGVH5RYiGNp7FKrlXi69p8=) |

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Here in Georgia, our democracy hangs in the balance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21343419/260497827/-293505166?refcode=em11082020-PM-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyYTRlOTYxLWE1MjItZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vn7Z_wMxclK6U-qKrC-TbZYWeSdW4rq-cFCQAzA0xV8=)
Team—
Many thought that this was not possible, that it would take a miracle to flip Georgia blue.
_But it didn't take a miracle._
It was our blood, sweat and tears. Our relentless drive to get our fellow Georgians to the polls. Our determination to send a statement to the defeated Trump administration and the Republican enablers that have infected our federal and state government. **And, now it looks like Georgia is in the Biden-Harris column.**
Our work isn't over. As sweet as it is to have defeated Trump, Mitch McConnell will still hold the reins of power in the U.S. Senate unless Georgia can deliver in the two Senate runoff elections. As long as that's the case, the best efforts of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to turn this country around will be blocked, just as McConnell did in the first days of President Obama's administration. **Georgia can change that by flipping TWO U.S. Senate seats.**
All of us with the Georgia Blue Project have been in the Georgia trenches for years. Like many of you, we have been working for decades to bring about this day. Our strategy of supporting State House and State Senate candidates got results with four seats flipped. Our efforts trickled UP the ticket as well, helping to re-elect Lucy McBath, elect Carolyn Bourdeaux and yes, helping push Joe Biden and Kamala Harris across the finish line. **And — in what might be the most consequential outcome — we helped put two U.S. Senate seats in play.**
[**_We must now prepare for that pair of contentious U.S. Senate special elections. Republicans will fight to hold these seats, but they cannot fathom the fight they will meet in us. Until we seize the majority from Mitch McConnell, our democracy will be stifled. Team, can you chip in $40 — $20 for each Senate race — today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21343420/260497828/-293505166?refcode=em11082020-PM-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyYTRlOTYxLWE1MjItZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vn7Z_wMxclK6U-qKrC-TbZYWeSdW4rq-cFCQAzA0xV8=)

This year has been difficult on us all. But if anything, we have proven that good can triumph over evil, and that we the people can defeat any enemy who threatens our democracy. With your help, the Georgia Blue Project will continue our mission to _Flip Georgia Blue_ , and once we do, we'll keep it blue for decades to come. **Thank you.**
—Teresa Tomlinson

body:
As we begin to close the book on the 2020 election cycle, it is clear that grassroots support win campaigns. There were thousands of volunteers in place to call voters, knock on doors, hang up signs, and show their support to a candidate they believe in.
Friend,

As we begin to close the book on the 2020 election cycle, it is clear that grassroots support win campaigns. There were thousands of volunteers in place to call voters, knock on doors, hang up signs, and show their support to a candidate they believe in.

Entering into the next election cycle, we are giving you an exclusive offer to become a founding member of Team Todd Young as he fights to defend his seat and the state of Indiana! As a part of the team, you will become a critical member of his reelection campaign and lead the charge to keep Indiana RED!

[**JOIN TEAM TODD TODAY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00176YuOjme7hqZOWPGN-zDT2JnBTQ7pcnGGtS5uSkcdkCZc6YpDLCaKaTmVzKMiKwpEMc3rEHGYXkFnW3AUCEdmVF4rJosCbKiA9cNX9DuPNkBKA4iwtPybkdZhMTqdvVJNvbf_8gtBaLZsPrbZ5qEKHVFQm8sGdcXGXRzZMsya5pY8QQCGs9L4NJYHn_Tj3KUZ4Ji72termYTqkz4KbwOHf2Aj5mHcE8YP1LIQYliozkmfnmL8PhaqohIZk-hj5DTCmn_LFH46j2TscdaRREzZ_Qwoonqpbc6yssHQAHYyDE7ErFtVrhATvpYddGkKkCBsLu9K-5yKqYwvMgV3e2N23ZYfMGdOhQaLr7H8THPDNm2d6nSZNjzE_aFL7LBt401&c=-qmTOFXVnSo2bzHxuyrzoFSf_Vr9tBvPJCESyqPCsLryHh1KI1Dhwg==&ch=o6eOo8AAjiwZWkRQGMYy7ffK8zKNj1JhgYpJgE8Ia2OyRGwJqF0ZBQ==)

subject: Pelosi won’t lose quietly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
It's Young Kim (R-CA). Election Day was 6 days ago, and this race still isn't called. There are thousands of ballots left to count.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BG-MVWD-rc-ho6FhcQct0T5CUL7pax4vxxMu-ZtJKbj6UutbIn7DzXB0KmX5rfA5QcSW_ISwMbpIi6XRQOP61_o_WZ8hqmxiV9p9jsMl3UOimC6jWUAKoRlWSZbIk9Gsu3cQQAnpL6QUuDCqp32o-MgENpVoBFzJ2UAJUnrNMqC8AlRPLmTK-voqVCf1ljbL2ybC8ER9mnq2aPLTtSrepVROaGFT8SM4xY2SivH1jrYM3Ps0Y7g7aZhkam7dxXhs6xyldzgAxvhwP0XPH2AmSHtn6PK9QvBpWY8c2zSg4m9HYgiXggr6nbim9aoDNxMIzAcaPxu5BvGD854HCw3iUqC1Qk0U0G_c07OADwneRuGm7sCJOlZ2MDXH2TArYzY20vBot5hxccvyLn7Dm9hNc6wo4TLf84044Obx7ZdnOm7QZBy7yWkK7w==&c=zMinur7fW7ToUW2nP1d15_0VnotOUkas1i8fA5U1sOWVXaA_aSjzsg==&ch=_1k2NB5o6WYRJKllVQ6Aw0E-3LwZOO2nqUQyqbTfcIt2e_YByOyigg==)

It's Young Kim (R-CA). Election Day was 6 days ago, and this race still isn't called. _There are thousands of ballots left to count._

Right now, we're in the lead but margins are slim. And the Democrats won't go quietly. Nancy Pelosi has an army of lawyers at her disposal ready to drag this out.

That makes your support, right now, more critical than ever. Getting to the finish line took everything we had, in fact, it zeroed out our accounts. We need to be ready to fight Pelosi in court. [**Can you chip in to our Recount Fund to keep us in the fight?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BG-MVWD-rc-ho6FhcQct0T5CUL7pax4vxxMu-ZtJKbj6UutbIn7DzXB0KmX5rfA5QcSW_ISwMbpIi6XRQOP61_o_WZ8hqmxiV9p9jsMl3UOimC6jWUAKoRlWSZbIk9Gsu3cQQAnpL6QUuDCqp32o-MgENpVoBFzJ2UAJUnrNMqC8AlRPLmTK-voqVCf1ljbL2ybC8ER9mnq2aPLTtSrepVROaGFT8SM4xY2SivH1jrYM3Ps0Y7g7aZhkam7dxXhs6xyldzgAxvhwP0XPH2AmSHtn6PK9QvBpWY8c2zSg4m9HYgiXggr6nbim9aoDNxMIzAcaPxu5BvGD854HCw3iUqC1Qk0U0G_c07OADwneRuGm7sCJOlZ2MDXH2TArYzY20vBot5hxccvyLn7Dm9hNc6wo4TLf84044Obx7ZdnOm7QZBy7yWkK7w==&c=zMinur7fW7ToUW2nP1d15_0VnotOUkas1i8fA5U1sOWVXaA_aSjzsg==&ch=_1k2NB5o6WYRJKllVQ6Aw0E-3LwZOO2nqUQyqbTfcIt2e_YByOyigg==)

Going into Election Day, polls had us in the lead. We knew it would be tough and we knew it could be close, and we've fought too hard to give up now.

[**Friend, help us win.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BG-MVWD-rc-ho6FhcQct0T5CUL7pax4vxxMu-ZtJKbj6UutbIn7DzXB0KmX5rfA5QcSW_ISwMbpIi6XRQOP61_o_WZ8hqmxiV9p9jsMl3UOimC6jWUAKoRlWSZbIk9Gsu3cQQAnpL6QUuDCqp32o-MgENpVoBFzJ2UAJUnrNMqC8AlRPLmTK-voqVCf1ljbL2ybC8ER9mnq2aPLTtSrepVROaGFT8SM4xY2SivH1jrYM3Ps0Y7g7aZhkam7dxXhs6xyldzgAxvhwP0XPH2AmSHtn6PK9QvBpWY8c2zSg4m9HYgiXggr6nbim9aoDNxMIzAcaPxu5BvGD854HCw3iUqC1Qk0U0G_c07OADwneRuGm7sCJOlZ2MDXH2TArYzY20vBot5hxccvyLn7Dm9hNc6wo4TLf84044Obx7ZdnOm7QZBy7yWkK7w==&c=zMinur7fW7ToUW2nP1d15_0VnotOUkas1i8fA5U1sOWVXaA_aSjzsg==&ch=_1k2NB5o6WYRJKllVQ6Aw0E-3LwZOO2nqUQyqbTfcIt2e_YByOyigg==)

For the 2020 Federal election cycle, a candidate committee may raise up to $2,800 from an individual, up to $5,000 from a Federal multicandidate PAC, and up to $2,800 from a Federal non-multicandidate PAC.

Committee may not accept funds for its recount efforts from corporations or labor unions, Federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, or any non-federal committees. Donations to our recount fund will not be aggregated with contributions from the general election.

These two seats are absolutely vital to maintaining our Senate Majority, posing as the firewall between our American values and Chuck Schumer's proposed radical Left policy. Ballots go out in just 9 days, Friend, we must act now to ensure that we can hold the line in Georgia. Will you stand with me and pledge a contribution right now?

clean_body: ' Retire Rubio' effort launched to oust Marco Rubio in 2022 -Florida Politics Friend, The Democrats are wasting no time looking toward 2022. The day after the election the radical left made me their top target. As I write this email, the Democrats are raising MILLIONS to try and retake Florida. They want to make Florida the next Georgia. They're going to spend the next two years doing whatever they can to buy my seat and make Florida blue in 2022. If they're successful, there will be nothing to stop the radical left from enacting their socialist policies and destroying our country. Florida has always been our conservative firewall, Friend, and if the Democrats take it away our freedoms and our democracy will go away too. We cannot let that happen! == == We know the Radical Left's tactics all too well- they will begin smearing me in all forms. I want to let you know that no matter what they say or do, no matter what the media portrays, no matter what, I will fight for YOU, our beautiful state of Florida, and our great country of America. == My parents came to America from Cuba to be given the opportunity to build a better life for themselves and our family. We have seen firsthand the effects of socialism and how it DESTROYS a country and its citizens. And yet that 's what the radical Left is pushing for. They would rather restrict your freedoms and take power than help this country prosper. That's what's on the line in 2022, Friend. This is not going to be a fight for a Senate seat, but instead a fight for our freedom and the future of our country. == The Left isn't going to stop, Friend, and neither will we. == We've seen what the left is capable of doing if they have time to build their warchest. We have to be ready. This fight is going to take all of us and the stakes have never been higher. I'm not going to stop fighting for this country and our people. I hope I can count on you to do the same. Best, Marco Rubio Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. | Dear Friend, **I have taken the fight to Tyrannical Phil Murphy and will defend President Trump.** Today, my team and I are in the United States Supreme Court, fighting Tyrannical Phil Murphy for violations of Article 1, Section 4 of the U.S. Constitution. Forcing New Jersey to submit to a corrupt vote-by-mail system has destroyed our election's integrity and I will not let this stand. The unchecked abuse Tyrannical Phil Murphy has unleashed upon us has crushed small businesses, trampled our rights and enriched the corrupt. And now, he wants to expand his powers even further. Someone has to stop him. That's why I'm declaring my candidacy for Governor of our great state.
## **We cannot win without you or your immediate and continued support. We must raise $1.5 million within the next 30 days to hit the ground running.**

Friend,

We will NOT give up. The Wisconsin results are too close.

Despite the ridiculous public polling used as a voter suppression tactic, Wisconsin has been a razor-thin race as we always knew it would be.

There have been irregularities in several Wisconsin counties which raise serious doubts about the validity of the results. We are requesting a RECOUNT.

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: JOINT STATEMENT FROM SENATORS DAVID PERDUE AND KELLY LOEFFLER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 9, 2020
JOINT STATEMENT FROM SENATORS DAVID PERDUE AND KELLY LOEFFLER
ATLANTA, GA - Today, Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler issued the following statement calling on Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger to resign:
"The management of Georgia elections has become an embarrassment for our state. Georgians are outraged, and rightly so. We have been clear from the beginning: every legal vote cast should be counted. Any illegal vote must not. And there must be transparency and uniformity in the counting process. This isn't hard. This isn't partisan. This is American. We believe when there are failures, they need to be called out -- even when it's in your own party. There have been too many failures in Georgia elections this year and the most recent election has shined a national light on the problems. While blame certainly lies elsewhere as well, the buck ultimately stops with the Secretary of State. The mismanagement and lack of transparency from the Secretary of State is unacceptable. Honest elections are paramount to the foundation of our democracy. The Secretary of State has failed to deliver honest and transparent elections. He has failed the people of Georgia, and he should step down immediately."
---
| ### Stephen Lawson Communications Director stephen@kellyforsenate.com
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

---
| | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Protect the Vote! Week of November 9th Action Items
body:
| |
---
**Don’t give up! Don’t give in!**

Action items for the week may change as we get more information, so one of the most important things we can ask you to do is to open every email that you get from us!

Information and calls to action are coming at us fast and furious and we need to get them to you all as soon as we can. So, open those emails!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**OPEN & READ EMAILS YOU GET FROM US**
As noted above, if you aren’t reading our emails, you will not see updated information and action items. Some of them are time-sensitive, so it is imperative that you are looking at the emails we are sending.
|
---
**LET US KNOW IF YOU’RE WILLING TO SHOW UP**
We have a post-election “Protect the Vote” action survey for you to fill out, if you haven’t already. We need to know if you can organize rallies, or attend rallies, and where you live. There may be other surveys later about other activities that you can help with, so keep an eye out for that!
[COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE0LTRlNzExZWE1OWRlOTRmMDFhZTJmZTBmN2FhOGQ4MDUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZnNXNWtWdVZiRVZwOS1ISGlWSXJreGZHYlNSOFVzSlR4UGJyVDVKdHEzOVVmdnZnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00Mjk1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=yVRJarl86c66eDvgrEFYAQ)
|
---
**CHECK THE RALLY/EVENT PAGE OFTEN FOR UPDATES**
Rallies are getting planned and announced so quickly that rather than send an email every time a new one is organized, we are posting them on our [**Protect the Vote 2020** page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE0LTRlNzExZWE1OWRlOTRmMDFhZTJmZTBmN2FhOGQ4MDUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ombDF6LEfEEgzoUlKltmAg), so please bookmark the page and check it often. You don’t want to miss out on an event in your area/state to show your support for President Trump and America!
[PROTECT THE VOTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE0LTRlNzExZWE1OWRlOTRmMDFhZTJmZTBmN2FhOGQ4MDUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=0ld7PlccVtpp8RbCk7aTOA)
|
---
**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of November 9th **
First, read the following article from Heritage Foundation’s Election Law Reform Initiative and Senior Legal Fellow, Hans A. von Spakovsky: [Why Safeguarding Our Elections Matters](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE0LTRlNzExZWE1OWRlOTRmMDFhZTJmZTBmN2FhOGQ4MDUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2VsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eS9jb21tZW50YXJ5L3doeS1zYWZlZ3VhcmRpbmctb3VyLWVsZWN0aW9ucy1tYXR0ZXJzP21pZD00Mjk1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=NXAFNhKRgQqRmQF7VOL1Aw). He wrote it on November 1, 2020. Then, depending on the ages of your kids/grandkids, have them read it, read it to them, or use the three key takeaways at the top of the article to sum it up for them. There is a video embedded in the article that you can watch with your kids or grandkids as well.

This first article is a good introduction into why election integrity is important and how election fraud undermines our freedoms.

Second, read the following article by Hans about why mail-in voting is such a problem: [The Risks of Mail-In Voting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE0LTRlNzExZWE1OWRlOTRmMDFhZTJmZTBmN2FhOGQ4MDUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2VsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eS9jb21tZW50YXJ5L3RoZS1yaXNrcy1tYWlsLXZvdGluZz9taWQ9NDI5NTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1rEVfQ4hB37LirSNh0kg9w).

This second article explains the specific problems with mail-in voting that we are now seeing unfold before our very eyes.

Third, tell them a little about what is happening right now, in the real world. Depending on their ages, you can tell them just a little or have a deep and full discussion. Remember that little kids are not equipped to handle all of the details and do not understand it all, so do not burden them with worry and anxiety at young ages that they cannot handle. Do use this as time to teach them about what is right and that right now, something is wrong.
|
---
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE0LTRlNzExZWE1OWRlOTRmMDFhZTJmZTBmN2FhOGQ4MDUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDI5NTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Ku1kg9DidrgPO0NFTdDEvQ)
|
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE0LTRlNzExZWE1OWRlOTRmMDFhZTJmZTBmN2FhOGQ4MDUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00Mjk1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=lJgw_-BFokbWBarzi88K2g)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Georgia Runoff Elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Conservatives across the nation are standing with President Trump
in the fight for election integrity. While the media
establishment may think they get to decide the winners of our
elections, the people in our country decide once every legal vote
is counted.

Fellow American:

Conservatives across the nation are standing with
President Trump in the fight for election integrity. While the
media establishment may think they get to decide the winners of
our elections, the people in our country decide once every legal
vote is counted.

In addition to upholding our election laws, we also
need to stop Chuck Schumer and the Democrats from taking control
of the Senate. To do that, we need to win at least one of the two
Senate runoff elections in Georgia on January 5th.

Please join us in supporting Senators David Perdue
(R-GA) and Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) with a split contribution today!

If the Democrats take over the Senate, they will
abolish the filibuster, grant statehood to DC and Puerto Rico,
and expand the seats in our courts so they can pack them with
liberal activists.

They want to pass the Green New Deal, gun
confiscation, open borders and to defund the police!!

We must act now to create a conservative firewall in
the Senate to stop the liberals from destroying our country.

And we need to send the liberal establishment a
message. We are disgusted by the lack of election integrity in
our country and we will do everything we can to defeat those who
sit on their hands and pretend this isn't a problem.

Voter turnout in the Georgia runoff elections will
be much lower than the presidential election, which means
conservatives have an opportunity to utterly crush the Democrats.

Please do your part and help us start a red wave for
conservatives in 2022 that starts in Georgia.

Our country is too great and our freedoms are too
sacred to give up without a fight. The Democrats may think they
have won, but this isn't over and we have just gotten started!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

RUNOFF COUNTDOWN

SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY

SAVE THE SENATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

clean_body: Conservatives across the nation are standing with President Trump in the fight for election integrity. While the media establishment may think they get to decide the winners of our elections, the people in our country decide once every legal vote is counted. Fellow American: Conservatives across the nation are standing with President Trump in the fight for election integrity. While the media establishment may think they get to decide the winners of our elections, the people in our country decide once every legal vote is counted. In addition to upholding our election laws, we also need to stop Chuck Schumer and the Democrats from taking control of the Senate. To do that, we need to win at least one of the two Senate runoff elections in Georgia on January 5th. Please join us in supporting Senators David Perdue (R-GA) and Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) with a split contribution today! If the Democrats take over the Senate, they will abolish the filibuster, grant statehood to DC and Puerto Rico, and expand the seats in our courts so they can pack them with liberal activists. They want to pass the Green New Deal, gun confiscation, open borders and to defund the police!! We must act now to create a conservative firewall in the Senate to stop the liberals from destroying our country. And we need to send the liberal establishment a message. We are disgusted by the lack of election integrity in our country and we will do everything we can to defeat those who sit on their hands and pretend this isn't a problem. Voter turnout in the Georgia runoff elections will be much lower than the presidential election, which means conservatives have an opportunity to utterly crush the Democrats. Please do your part and help us start a red wave for conservatives in 2022 that starts in Georgia. Our country is too great and our freedoms are too sacred to give up without a fight. The Democrats may think they have won, but this isn't over and we have just gotten started! Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely, Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund RUNOFF COUNTDOWN SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY SAVE THE SENATE Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003 Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. body:
The path to a Senate majority runs through Georgia
Hi there --
**My U.S. Senate race against GOP Sen. David Perdue in Georgia is headed to a January 5 runoff. And if I don 't win, Mitch McConnell and the GOP will keep their Senate majority.**
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc662/2a380d31/20122aac/f05e67/3419688984/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0b3Nzb2ZmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDExMDlfbXdoNG9zc29mZl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ossoff?refcode=e20201109_mwh4ossoff_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Election Day may be behind us, but this Senate race in Georgia is far from over.
The future of the Senate is at stake -- and we expect an unprecedented full-frontal attack on my campaign from the Republican Party.
Let me be clear: **The road to flipping the Senate runs right through Georgia.** Ending Mitch McConnell's stranglehold over the Senate won't be possible without the urgent support of this team as we gear up for a tough fight in my home state. That's why I'm reaching out to you today:
[**Please chip in $3 or more to my campaign so we can win this race in Georgia. name: Tim Scott
subject: Less Government, More Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
As a proud conservative, I have always advocated for free-market solutions to many problems impacting Americans, including poverty. The simple truth is this: People succeed when the government steps out of the way. I grew up in economically distressed neighborhoods, and I know that the last thing struggling communities need or want is the federal government telling them what their problems are or what their solutions should be.
Friend,

As a proud conservative, I have always advocated for free-market solutions to many problems impacting Americans, including poverty. The simple truth is this: **People succeed when the government steps out of the way.**

I grew up in economically distressed neighborhoods, and I know that the last thing struggling communities need or want is the federal government telling them what their problems are or what their solutions should be.

We need local control, and **we need free-market solutions to solve problems.**

[**Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help promote our free-market solutions?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/we-need-free-markets/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20201109_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040284-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201109_less-government-more-freedom)

Friend, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats cannot wait to take over the Senate and reverse our conservative victories.

[**Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help promote free-market solutions?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/we-need-free-markets/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20201109_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040284-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201109_less-government-more-freedom)

I am counting on you to stand with me, for the good of our country.

Sincerely,

Tim Scott

**
**
PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Protecting those who need us most
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It's not an easy conversation, but I want to talk to you today about the challenges facing some of our most vulnerable neighbors. The effects of the pandemic have presented barriers to much-needed support systems. That's why today, I'm announcing several new initiatives aimed at rebuilding support systems, promoting mental health, and supporting survivors of violence and those struggling with a substance use disorder.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uh0aYoBT3eo5E8JQZh-RBbjp9fB-3gKpv93Jq1IQvoJhjJrSh0KJ5zKHsqLwEP6GJKzfEabvo6BZvu3ocYydmnUME8_l3Zh9bwhl9yEjBttruQfIqTrCTmV3m71WjqraeVu8MmlIlm5x3kTIA3mcNY-yCQXwnn-3IaO8KFRmzr7lAPBaWW3olMOXIu4P9g1R4YRJzvyz-xI=&c=RuysnwaLcbYx2ZaaKC1_rwye6oEWsDntaiNyMp1zJcpZXxKZLrXpAA==&ch=U8HB4iry8JxDBU22sfLR5kV4nCzCXeTA2fKXMPTLgIRmRuYLxppIwQ==)
---
| Early in the pandemic, we had to close many group-based activities like childcare centers, senior centers, support groups, and adult daycare programs. Today, although we've re-opened many services under enhanced safety guidelines, these programs are still struggling with limited staff and resources. We're stepping up to ensure that those services are available to those who need them most by investing $3 million in stimulus funding to expand home and community-based services for individuals living with intellectual and developmental disabilities.
We also know that this pandemic has inflicted unparalleled stress on our most vulnerable populations and those who take care of them. That's why we're going to invest in better mental health supports for both caregivers and teachers. The Rhode Island Parent Information Network will begin providing online caregiver workshops for those across the state who care for family members. These workshops will provide tools and supports to caregivers to cope with the stress and anxiety that often comes with caring for a loved one, and I want to encourage you to participate if you are out there listening and need some help. Workshops begin November 17th and you can register now by visiting the Rhode Island Parent Information Network website at [www.ripin.org/chn](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uh0aYoBT3eo5E8JQZh-RBbjp9fB-3gKpv93Jq1IQvoJhjJrSh0KJ52QqZClk4IlZgHafPFIhpS17KY6yTT-BOpk7pTjbxb4y39IcV--pkNT4SLBHbeaPmph2a7WrWqFSwN2MYAnJcGPE7axZQs91Xg==&c=RuysnwaLcbYx2ZaaKC1_rwye6oEWsDntaiNyMp1zJcpZXxKZLrXpAA==&ch=U8HB4iry8JxDBU22sfLR5kV4nCzCXeTA2fKXMPTLgIRmRuYLxppIwQ==) or calling 401-432-7217.
Students have also struggled during this pandemic. The transition to distance learning in the spring led to increased anxiety, isolation and depression among students of all ages, and that's particularly true for those who had previously experienced trauma. I'm excited to announce that we are investing in resources that will help schools better serve the complex needs of their students by placing Student Assistance Counselors in several Providence schools to provide outreach as well as individual and group counseling sessions for students. We'll have additional announcements next week about resources for our educators as they work to support students during this stressful time.
Finally, we are taking steps to address two rising tragedies in Rhode Island. The first is a concerning trend we're seeing in fatal overdoses. COVID-19 has increased isolation and has disconnected some Rhode Islanders from the help they need. So we are funding resources that will allow local providers to offer home-delivered harm reduction services and provide the overdose reversal medicine, naloxone, that can save the life of someone experiencing an overdose. If you or someone you know needs help with a substance use disorder, go to [PreventOverdoseRI.org/COVID-19](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uh0aYoBT3eo5E8JQZh-RBbjp9fB-3gKpv93Jq1IQvoJhjJrSh0KJ52QqZClk4IlZ5cTjZ8DcAmenneS8neP9pw7jK1Ct8x8PSmqKUGfGvhabLiSvne3Tm1dOt2DhN5mHPF0UT6CX_ISy_DexQDP2qb4FvwEqiT2H&c=RuysnwaLcbYx2ZaaKC1_rwye6oEWsDntaiNyMp1zJcpZXxKZLrXpAA==&ch=U8HB4iry8JxDBU22sfLR5kV4nCzCXeTA2fKXMPTLgIRmRuYLxppIwQ==) for a list of local resources to keep you, your family, and loved ones safe.
We're also seeing a significant increase in domestic violence-related calls to the statewide helpline over the past few months. Today, I'm pleased to share that we will be providing $1 million in grants to non-profit organizations whose primary mission is to serve survivors of intimate partner violence, sexual assault and human trafficking, as well as their children. These funds will be used to increase assistance services for survivors, including counseling and advocacy. If you are experiencing violence, I want you to know that you are not alone. Call the Rhode Island statewide helpline for 24-hour support at 800-494-8100.
If you're in an unsafe situation, or you feel that you need help, please know that Rhode Island is here for you. We will do everything we can to make sure that you have the supports you need through this pandemic and beyond.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uh0aYoBT3eo5E8JQZh-RBbjp9fB-3gKpv93Jq1IQvoJhjJrSh0KJ52QqZClk4IlZfCnd1JsU4uJSqvttwPAW6m1DolBYMhHtm87LlsFbZzFc7V0109C87EOiEeva7DcN9pE_6xETXInFtheoywH7gxP-d_IESt14qZSxZL8f-6ly_GS0A4slDpVvKs1PrlolKSXd7kEqsIXfFXn5GAnAu17FloRIPVk7ATnlLFQn1rxd63tpWV_vSmzjgd3yoWe0v52TbNpfJ3gQxdbQhOoimP_vhVF5qVX3sgCGvH1WiO8djqWLYt39rNv2wucvVh_JhHZxjKfoPww=&c=RuysnwaLcbYx2ZaaKC1_rwye6oEWsDntaiNyMp1zJcpZXxKZLrXpAA==&ch=U8HB4iry8JxDBU22sfLR5kV4nCzCXeTA2fKXMPTLgIRmRuYLxppIwQ==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

| Patriot,
Thousands of patriots like you have helped Kat Cammack to a historic win here in our district.
Thanks to your support, Kat is set to become the youngest Republican woman elected to serve in the 117th Congress!
This monumental victory also highlights just how incredibly blessed we are to call America home. Only here can one go from homeless to the House of Representatives in less than a decade, and thanks to her championing of an America First message, Kat is set to do just that.
Watch our Congresswoman-elect in FL-03 talk about her historic victory here:

| After failed liberal policies took away her family's small cattle ranch, Kat Cammack didn't get down on her luck. Instead, she picked herself up from her bootstraps and will soon get to work fighting to make sure big government tyranny doesn't hurt Floridians the same way that it hurt her and her family.
But Kat can't take on the D.C. Swamp alone - rush in your support for our youngest Republican Congresswoman-elect in FL-03 to help her get to work fighting for us!

| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
November 9, 2020 ** **$7.2 Million and Growing: GAsenate.com Brings in Big Hauls for Warnock, Ossoff** ATLANTA - Today, Fair Fight announced that $7.2 has been raised at [GAsenate.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e7/34a064cc/1a4cdc5f/7022e20/2725648857/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://GAsenate.com"). The three-way split ActBlue page has thus far brought in more than $2.4 million each for Fair Fight, Jon Ossoff, and Reverend Raphael Warnock. The effort comes following President-Elect Joe Biden victory in Georgia -- the first time since 1992 that a Democrat has won the state at the presidential level. January 5 will mark two Senate runoff elections in Georgia, with a U.S. Senate majority on the line. Supporters can join this historic effort at [GAsenate.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e7/34a064cc/1a4cdc5f/7022e20/2725648857/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://GAsenate.com"). Georgians can request their mail ballots for the January 5 runoff at [https://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov/](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e7/34a064cc/1a4cdc5f/7022e21/2725648857/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov/"). ### |

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/AtaPHRzzQFg1gmknHW8sJO-cgUgL0tzTLk90tOrEZUE=/6eszoSpON9qDgTO9I0iAy2qEWF2g0h1Tikjv0uP4PIw=?refcode=11.9.20ThankYouEmail)
---
| Dear Peter, I am writing to thank you for all of your support to my re-election campaign efforts! I am thankful for the opportunity to serve my community, our Commonwealth, and our country in Congress for another term, and I am grateful to people like you who helped make it possible. I believe in accountable and engaged representation, which means I have rooted my work in the stories I have heard from voters across our district. The stories and experiences people have been gracious enough to share with me have inspired, humbled, and motivated me to win re-election so that I may continue focusing on the issues that matter in their lives. **While 2020 has presented challenge after challenge to our country and to our people, we have continued to come together to fight for and work for what is right and what matters. While many hurdles and struggles lie ahead, I am confident that we can continue forward as a nation. ** While this wasn't a typical campaign year, we were still able to run a campaign built on integrity - focusing on the needs of the people in this community and talking about the substantive issues affecting your lives. **And most importantly, this victory would not have been possible without the incredible commitment and enthusiasm of those who have supported us. This campaign could not have succeeded without you - our tremendous network of volunteers and grassroots supporters.** To everyone who contributed to this campaign so generously, to those of you who made phone calls, sent texts, delivered yard signs, and volunteered: **thank you. This would not have been possible without you.** I am sincerely humbled and honored to have earned your support, Peter. And above all else, I am ready to continue the hard work of working for you and your families in Congress. Thank you, _\- Abigail_
---

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/AtaPHRzzQFg1gmknHW8sJO-cgUgL0tzTLk90tOrEZUE=/6eszoSpON9qDgTO9I0iAy2qEWF2g0h1Tikjv0uP4PIw=?refcode=11.9.20ThankYouEmail)

---

---

| Dear Friend, **I have taken the fight to Tyrannical Phil Murphy and will defend President Trump.** Today, my team and I are in the United States Supreme Court, fighting Tyrannical Phil Murphy for violations of Article 1, Section 4 of the U.S. Constitution. Forcing New Jersey to submit to a corrupt vote-by-mail system has destroyed our election's integrity and I will not let this stand. The unchecked abuse Tyrannical Phil Murphy has unleashed upon us has crushed small businesses, trampled our rights and enriched the corrupt. And now, he wants to expand his powers even further. Someone has to stop him. That's why I'm declaring my candidacy for Governor of our great state.
## **We cannot win without you or your immediate and continued support. We must raise $1.5 million within the next 30 days to hit the ground running.**

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Fight for Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
First, I want to say I'm so grateful for your help in this election. I know you're ready for a break.
But our work isn't over and the fight for a Democratic Senate majority is still at stake.
**Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff are both heading to a runoff election in Georgia that could determine control of the Senate.**
This is our last chance to take control of the Senate and remove Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader.
**[Contribute $5 now to stand with Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the Georgia runoff election.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201107i_1098&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We're still counting votes in Georgia, but Joe Biden is in the lead. We know now that this state is winnable for Democrats -- and all the polling on a head-to-head match up in these races shows it's a toss up.
With control of the Senate up for grabs, this is a crucial **MUST WIN** race.
**[We need to give Georgia our all, Peter. Contribute $5 now to support Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the Georgia runoff.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201107i_1098&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201107i_1098&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: The New Biden-Burisma Documents
body:
After a nearly 11 month FOIA battle to obtain documents on Burisma and the Bidens, Judicial Watch has finally received proof of what many have speculated for months: that the Obama State Department knew about the Biden-Burisma connection. Just days before the presidential election, the State Department “finally gave us a briefing memo showing that the Democratic lobbying firm hired by Burisma met with the anti-Trump ambassador, Ambassador Yovanovitch,” Fitton explained on Friday.

[ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51991&L=21166&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1RcWk1Q3Y0T0ZKZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDkyMTAwNDA=)

The documents include an email showing Mrs. McCabe was recruited for a Virginia state senate race in February 2015 by then-Virginia Lieutenant Governor Ralph Northam’s office. The news that former Secretary of State Clinton used a private email server broke five days later, on March 2, 2015. Five days after that, former Clinton Foundation board member and Democrat party fundraiser, Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe, met with the McCabes. She announced her candidacy on March 12. Soon afterward, Clinton/McAuliffe-aligned political groups donated nearly $700,000 (40% of the campaign’s total funds) to McCabe’s wife for her campaign. clean_body: After a nearly 11 month FOIA battle to obtain documents on Burisma and the Bidens, Judicial Watch has finally received proof of what many have speculated for months: that the Obama State Department knew about the Biden-Burisma connection. Just days before the presidential election, the State Department “finally gave us a briefing memo showing that the Democratic lobbying firm hired by Burisma met with the anti-Trump ambassador, Ambassador Yovanovitch,” Fitton explained on Friday. = | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 09, 2020 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == In 2017, Judicial Watch uncovered Justice Department records concerning ethics issues related to McCabe’s involvement with his wife’s political campaign. The documents include an email showing Mrs. McCabe was recruited for a Virginia state senate race in February 2015 by then-Virginia Lieutenant Governor Ralph Northam’s office. The news that former Secretary of State Clinton used a private email server broke five days later, on March 2, 2015. Five days after that, former Clinton Foundation board member and Democrat party fundraiser, Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe, met with the McCabes. She announced her candidacy on March 12. Soon afterward, Clinton/McAuliffe-aligned political groups donated nearly $700,000 (40% of the campaign’s total funds) to McCabe’s wife for her campaign. == ---|--- | | | | = | = After a nearly 11 month FOIA battle to obtain documents on Burisma and the Bidens, Judicial Watch has finally received proof of what many have speculated for months: that the Obama State Department knew about the Biden-Burisma connection. Just days before the presidential election, the State Department “finally gave us a briefing memo showing that the Democratic lobbying firm hired by Burisma met with the anti-Trump ambassador, Ambassador Yovanovitch,” Fitton explained on Friday. = ---|--- | | | | == | == On May 19, Senator Grassley responded and asked for “the declassification of additional information related to the unmasking of Americans around the time of the 2016 election, but also to expand the scope of our request to include information as early as January 2016. Based on our investigation and recent press reports, we are increasingly concerned that the surveillance of U.S. persons affiliated with the Trump campaign began earlier than the opening of the FBI’s Crossfire Hurricane investigation in late July 2016.” == ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced recently that President Tom Fitton’s new book, A Republic Under Assault: The Left’s Ongoing Attack on American Freedom will debut at #12 on the New York Times Hardcover Non-Fiction List on November 8. The book will also come in at #14 on the Times’s Combined Print and E-Book Best Sellers List. Additionally, A Republic Under Assault will debut at #2 on Publishers Weekly’s Top Hardcover Frontlist Nonfiction List and #4 on Publishers Weekly’s Overall Best Sellers List on November 2. The book has only been in bookstores nationwide since October 20. = ---|--- | | | = The Washington Times Judicial Watch has released a comparison study of Census Bureau population statistics and state voter registration data to reveal a notable disparity. The watch dog group is now warning of potential voter fraud and “dirty” voter rolls. = = The New York Times With the election coming to a close, the Trump and Biden campaigns, voting rights organizations and conservative groups are raising money and dispatching armies of lawyers for what could become a state-by-state, county-by-county legal battle over which ballots will ultimately be counted. = Townhall The emails show that Dr. Anthony Fauci signed off on the World Health Organization's approval of China's response to the Wuhan coronavirus outbreak in late January. China unleashed a deadly virus on the world and covered it up, resulting in the preventable deaths of countless thousands across the globe. == == == == | CLIPS == = TWEETS | | | | | = ---|---|--- According to Biden, Biden's talking to foreign leaders about U.S. policy is a violation of the Logan Act. At least that is what he and the Obama gang said in 2016-17 as they were pursuing their seditious conspiracy against @RealDonaldTrump and @GenFlynn. 2:21 PM · Nov 9, 2020 | | | | | = ---|---|--- Without @RealDonaldTrump reforms of @FDA bureaucratic hurdles, we'd be YEARS away from an effect vaccine for #coronavirus. name: =?UTF-8?Q?Tom_O=E2=80=99Halleran?=
subject: Thank you to everyone who made this victory possible!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I want to take a moment to thank all of my incredible staff, volunteers, and supporters who made this win possible, including my wife Pat and all of o | | | [](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=448c00408a254d9e801091b9e9b23cd9&_e=toP6GpAOTZMVxizQ0U51UZaYhxn-SDBaorvQLXITmn6UdRYvyld7A1G_0l7RX9PgXxvD0SWisT4Z_q4F5n0l2rIWnkleqT9DWFRxnVoqhjPObNroU39kEsbHHme3IkPPc110F4fhzNnuMwv8hsPJzkdsYOZNuGP8uVQb6KNB5SpPOkdXN6K7cf2HgeDb1v6b3upH8Nz3jKToTqppDOQkb8si1JJm-wjqs5XZuZhC8bnbSu0b7D1EeLmJIp6KMhEqoFnHYOd1T6SfLQl9CnFHUg%3D%3D) Team, It’s official: We won Arizona’s First Congressional District! One of the most competitive House districts in the state. And we won thanks to you. It is the honor of my lifetime to serve Arizona families in Congress. I’m ready to continue working to get things done on affordable health care, lowering prescription drug prices, cleaning up Washington, and supporting our tribal communities. I want to take a moment to thank all of my incredible staff, volunteers, and supporters who made this win possible, including my wife Pat and all of our wonderful children and grandchildren. I also want to thank my opponent, Tiffany Shedd, for a hard-fought race that gave the people of Arizona’s First Congressional District a choice. Whether or not folks supported me in this election, I will fight for everyone in Arizona’s First District. I will continue to be an independent and bipartisan voice you can count on to work across the aisle and solve problems. There is so much work to be done. This election was only the beginning. Now we need to take our victory and turn it into legislation and action! I look forward to all the things we can accomplish when we work together. Many thanks,
Tom O’Halleran
Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? ---
Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992 Phoenix, AZ 85082

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See What Walz Just Said About His New Lockdown?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_lockdown_sta&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Governor Walz is a Tyrant in the Making. Did you see what he said today about who and what he will target in the upcoming lockdown?** "In all fairness, you gathering with three or four families in your backyard, or worse yet in your garage, for a celebration, would have an equally detrimental effect, and we'll have to target those, too." ([See Star Tribune article](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=njZW7APv9ZjWe_0fvGjiu2fUmYefg_dCgJm1mjpYI3ut8I-U_oAbSEpP4tRaPnAA8EuiOdzFGqzRwaD7B4RQVI7LHvKHqPKN5v6ssNNOpjTSQwI48K4B5oq9jdnWqm_vJ1LPVwpIh8IEWTXnRg6ZXA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_lockdown_sta&n=2))
## Target those, too?!
This guy is drunk with power. All reporting that we've seen suggests that Tyrant-Wannabe Walz is forcing a second lockdown in Minnesota this week...citing his Emergency Powers as the authority. That's the same Emergency Powers we've been trying to END since April. **[Four Democrats we targeted with YOUR support lost their elections for voting the wrong way on Walz' Emergency Powers.](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_cronies_go_down?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_lockdown_sta&n=3)** What does this new lockdown mean for you and me? We don't have answers yet, but Governor Walz is laying out his new decree tomorrow afternoon in a press conference. One of the ideas leaked to the media is that the Governor is going to force early closures for bars/restaurants, making it more difficult for these businesses to rebound from his previous lockdown. Also at risk is in-person schooling for our children and shutting down other business like gyms/fitness centers. **Think now that the election is over, we get a break? Think again. Walz extended his Emergency Powers and is calling back the Legislature on Thursday. So here we go again! Time to STOP one guy from making all the laws in our state**. Stay tuned to Action 4 Liberty for more details tomorrow. Go to [action4liberty.com](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=vJzsGDqiixqCUhiH9Q9jjaye9n2446FS2SXLeU0SLh0&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_lockdown_sta&n=4). Jake Duesenberg
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_lockdown_sta&n=5)[http://www.action4liberty.com/](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_lockdown_sta&n=6)
Action 4 Liberty · United States

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_lockdown_sta&n=8).

Friend,

This election may be over, but our work is just getting started.

We’ve been talking all year about standing up and addressing some of the most consequential issues we’ve ever faced, both as Illinoisans and Americans – and we can’t afford to lose sight of that mission just because our votes have already been cast.

That’s why we’re asking everybody on our grassroots team just one question today:

**What issue matters the most to you now that Election Day is behind us?**

[**ECONOMIC RECOVERY**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=83ca4464c6e2492ab803b19867675577&_e=FkosLEvKOM2P7zYCveZS36s7X0gePoHYoaUTlxd0Yd1iWelPwlH4keY-rNS4XrZ0hHapbeXyjOHMRe85-27ZhRpuzlQZV5sp5odjE7JS2WZPnR3bPZbeeslHpxHj6D75CYc-QbikgJwKPb_I_uIp0AgrUWQk6ZQm1mxF_ckF6Yjny4oWkdGwCPCthALoV1Ft33DpymTZN6fnrSkjpLzyIsFY4Z1xE8PvLZdudE1GcUq1jCbUFtTn-URrFIfR0w3SJahRuq9e0xK_zyro3nPfd0m2kkWFZ3XhkZ5be3A3E8PKm4W4cIDuXsRe_laAC8cr4bopY7VRQYVZnaNP4J3xuypXUOC2mM5AR5K0qvkE8cJGfp1rfKoN12Mq_g3loIR-N_mor3Vz3ZXisRLvCnBkx_Ye_XU62VvS0jdAtWahCODAvmka7TXGvZPI5GXMH9ouvgOpMmhAf1Hk8JRA5AMRGhqXm5XGNtYpe4JDhTGPaCliF3XN-Hg4C5zSnzlZeu4C_EYA8LiogVsvk0BEuyEiww%3D%3D)

This is going to be a team effort – and I’m counting on each and every one of us to work together so we can create the necessary progress that Illinoisans and Americans everywhere are counting on.

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd28/18e32a7f/4b890659/7b20679a/2410704828/VEsEAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=auto")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd28/18e32a7f/4b890659/7b20679b/2410704828/VEsEAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd28/18e32a7f/4b890659/7b206798/2410704828/VEsEAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd28/18e32a7f/4b890659/7b2067e4/2410704828/VEsEAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd28/18e32a7f/4b890659/7b206799/2410704828/VEsEDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

subject: We can still flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Did you see Patty's message about the Georgia runoff?
**[We can still elect a Democratic majority in the Senate -- but we have to win these fights in Georgia. Pitch in $5 to support Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201106-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201108i_537&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201106-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201108i_537&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from Senator Patty Murray---
Team,
This has been a long week, and while I'm hopeful we'll soon know for sure that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are heading to the White House, I want to make sure we're also focused on the path to a Senate Democratic majority that runs through Georgia.
**Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff are both heading to a runoff election that could determine control of the Senate.**
**[Our work to elect a Democratic majority isn't finished, .
